page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Extract coverage information from BAM files, supporting stranded and physical coverage and streams.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tools to extract coverage informations from BAM (and CRAM) files, based on the covtobed algorithm that supports stranded coverage and physical coverage, input from streams and uses a memory-efficient algorithm.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tools to extract coverage informations from BAM (and CRAM) files, based on the covtobed algorithm that supports stranded coverage and physical coverage, input from streams and uses a memory-efficient algorithm.
